leads.outreachMessage: Ms. Chavez, we noticed your property at 18143 Sw 144 Pl has an active re-roof tile permit and wanted to reach out. Many homeowners leave significant insurance money on the table by handling claims alone — Claim Remedy Adjusters works on your behalf to ensure you receive the full payout your policy allows. There's no upfront cost; we only get paid when you do. Please call or text us at (305) 555-0100 to get started.

Mr. Lowe, we saw that your property at 9468 Sw 146 Pl has an active metal reroof permit on file. Many homeowners don't realize their insurance policy may cover a significant portion of roof repair costs — Claim Remedy Adjusters can review your claim and fight to recover the maximum settlement you're entitled to, at no upfront cost. We'd love to help you get what you deserve. Please call or text us at (305) 555-0100 to get started.

Mr. Roig, we noticed your property at 3465 Sw 73 Avenue Rd has an active shingle reroof permit and wanted to reach out. Roofing insurance claims are often undervalued when homeowners navigate them alone — Claim Remedy Adjusters are licensed public adjusters who specialize in recovering the full settlement your policy allows, at no upfront cost to you. Please call or text us at (305) 555-0100 to get started.

Mr. Martinez, we saw that your property at 11962 Sw 110 Street Cir S has an active reroof permit on file. As licensed public adjusters, Claim Remedy Adjusters can review your insurance claim and ensure you're not leaving money on the table — we work exclusively on your behalf with no upfront cost, getting paid only when you do. Please call or text us at (305) 555-0100 to get started.

Mr. Castro, we noticed your property at 9511 Sw 148 Pl has an active flat roof permit and wanted to reach out. Flat roof repairs often involve damage that insurers undervalue — Claim Remedy Adjusters are licensed public adjusters who know how to build a strong claim and maximize your settlement at no upfront cost to you. Please call or text us at (305) 555-0100 to get started.

Ms. Ramirez, we saw that your property at 12984 Nw 8 Ln has an active tile re-roof permit and wanted to reach out.
